name: Admin
shortDescription: The command chamber of your dGuild. Manage identity, branding, and activate modules.
longDescription: The Admin module is the foundation of every dGuild. It allows the guild master (currently a single wallet admin) to configure branding, general information, claim a custom slug, and activate or manage modules from the catalog.
detailedDescription: Upon creation, every dGuild is deployed with the Admin module active. This module governs guild identity and metadata, visual branding and presentation, custom slug registration, module activation and subscription management, and global configuration settings. The Admin wallet has full authority over module deployment and configuration. As DecentraGuild evolves, expanded governance mechanics may be introduced.

activationInstructions.intro: Your guild begins here. Establish your banner, name your hall, and prepare to expand.
steps: Set your guild name and general information
Upload branding assets and configure visuals
Review available modules in the catalog
Activate the systems your guild requires

slug.name: Custom slug
slug.shortDescription: Custom subdomain for your dGuild (e.g. your-slug.dguild.org).
